summary: This page explains what information is required to compute a system response using a simple RC circuit example. It derives the output voltage in terms of the input current and shows that the system response for times after t0 can be determined from the input over [t0, t] together with the initial capacitor voltage v_C(t0), illustrating the role of initial conditions.

figures.caption: Fig. 1.26 An example of a simple electrical system.
